title: Family members list — detailed manual test cases (non-E2E)
no_authentication_scope: No login or authenticated session is required for this screen. The viewer and each family member row are identified via the QA harness only: seeded `family_harness_id` and per-row `member_harness_id` bound to the app install (or equivalent: staging deep link query params / environment flag). Preconditions name harness slots (e.g. member A = `harness_m1`)—never passwords, tokens, or sign-in.
prerequisites: See `no_authentication_scope` for how viewer and members are identified without login.

Staging build with Firebase Remote Config readable/overridable: family_list_refresh_interval_s (default 5), low_battery_threshold_pct (default 10), place_stay_minutes (default 20), walk_vehicle_hysteresis_s (default 6).
Safety badge artwork and state names must match the product design table (not in Jira); until attached, assert placeholder state keys from engineering.
Health metrics for members can be injected via Apple Health / Health Connect test doubles or backend fixture timestamps as agreed with the team.

deprecated_test_cases.reason: Prior draft assumed signed-in user; feature scope is no-auth. Replaced by KUDO-35-TC-001 (group order), KUDO-35-TC-079–081 (You scenarios), and related ordering cases.
Prior draft mixed auth with refresh checks. Replaced by KUDO-35-TC-010 through KUDO-35-TC-013 and per-key RC cases KUDO-35-TC-087–090.

test_cases.title: Order: all Not safe rows above all Safe rows; A→Z inside each group
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Members: `m_ns_a` (Not safe, name “Charlie”), `m_ns_b` (Not safe, name “Alpha”), `m_s_a` (Safe, name “Zulu”), `m_s_b` (Safe, name “Bravo”). Viewer `harness_viewer` is separate row (You).
test_cases.test_data: Not safe: Alpha, Charlie. Safe: Bravo, Zulu. You: last.
steps: Navigate to Family members list screen.
List every visible member name in top-to-bottom order (exclude labeling check for You until TC-079+).
Identify which rows are Not safe vs Safe using safety badge / backend truth from harness log.
Assert every Not safe row appears above every Safe row (no Safe row interleaved above a Not safe row).
Within Not safe only: assert names sort A→Z (expect: Alpha, Charlie).
Within Safe only: assert names sort A→Z (expect: Bravo, Zulu).
Capture screenshot + ordered list in test notes.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is: [Not safe A→Z] then [Safe A→Z] then You (You verified in TC-079–081). No cross-group mis-order.

test_cases.title: Duplicate display names — stable order across refreshes
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Two distinct member IDs share display name “Alex Smith” (or same prefix): `m_dup_1`, `m_dup_2` with different safety or secondary id.
test_cases.test_data: Same visible name, different harness IDs.
steps: Open list; record top-to-bottom order of the two Alex rows with member id from harness overlay/debug if available.
Wait through ≥2 foreground refresh intervals (see TC-011) without changing fixture.
Re-record order.
Change unrelated field (e.g. activity text) for only `m_dup_2`; wait refresh; confirm order unchanged unless safety/order rules require change.
test_cases.expected_result: Order between duplicates is stable across refreshes when underlying sort keys unchanged; ties broken deterministically (document rule: e.g. member id).

test_cases.title: Locale collation for non-ASCII names within safety blocks
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Members in same safety group: names with Å, é, 中文 (use product primary locale).
steps: Set device/app locale per test plan.
Open list.
Write expected alphabetical order per product collation spec.
Compare actual order within the Not safe group and within the Safe group separately.
test_cases.expected_result: Order matches product-defined collation within each safety block.

test_cases.title: Two rows: one other member + You
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Members: one non-viewer `m_only` and viewer `harness_viewer`.
steps: Open list.
Row 1: `m_only`.
Row 2: You.
test_cases.expected_result: Strictly two rows; You occupies bottom.

test_cases.title: All non-You members Safe — alphabetical Safe block then You
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. All members except viewer are Safe; include ≥2 names out of order (e.g. “Zed”, “Ann”).
steps: Open list.
Confirm no Not safe badges for non-You members.
Confirm non-You names sort A→Z.
Confirm You below all.
test_cases.expected_result: Single Safe section sorted A→Z; You last.

test_cases.title: List reload after app resume from background
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Fixture can flip `m_a` from Safe→Not safe (or swap order) while app backgrounded.
test_cases.test_data: Before: note order + badge for `m_a`. After background change: expect different order/badge.
steps: On Family members list; write down order of first 5 rows + `m_a` badge.
Press Home / app switcher; leave app backgrounded ≥5 s.
Apply harness change to `m_a` (safety or name) via fixture/console.
Return to app; land on same list screen (no cold kill).
Within one UI frame cycle or documented product delay, compare list to pre-background snapshot.
Confirm updated badge/order without force-stop.
test_cases.expected_result: Foreground resume triggers data reload; list matches new fixture within product timing; no stale infinite state.

test_cases.title: Foreground polling uses Remote Config interval default 5 s
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. RC key `family_list_refresh_interval_s` = 5 (default). Stay on list; fixture can change activity text for `m_a` without nav.
test_cases.test_data: Change `m_a` activity string at T0; measure time until UI updates.
steps: Confirm RC value = 5 in staging dashboard or debug overlay.
On list screen; record current activity line for `m_a`.
At T0, push new activity string via harness.
Start stopwatch; wait until text changes on screen.
Record delta t; repeat for second change to see periodicity.
test_cases.expected_result: Updates occur about every 5 s (allow ±1 s device jitter); no navigation required.

test_cases.title: Foreground polling follows non-default RC interval
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Set RC `family_list_refresh_interval_s` to 15.
steps: Set RC to 15; kill/restart app if required for fetch.
Perform same stopwatch measurement as TC-011 twice.
Restore RC to 5; restart if needed; one spot check that interval returns near 5 s.
test_cases.expected_result: Observed interval tracks RC (≈15 s then ≈5 s after restore).

test_cases.title: After refresh: no duplicate rows; scroll still reaches all members
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha` with ≥8 members to force scroll.
test_cases.test_data: Scroll position: ~50% from top before refresh.
steps: Open list; slowly scroll to middle until row `m_mid` is centered.
Wait ≥2 refresh ticks.
Scroll to top; count distinct member ids/names.
Scroll to bottom; confirm You once.
Check for duplicated name+avatar pairs adjacent or anywhere.
test_cases.expected_result: Row count equals family size; each member once; scroll not stuck; no overlapping duplicate rows.

test_cases.title: Each row shows avatar (image or approved placeholder)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha` with ≥3 members including missing photo URL in fixture.
test_cases.test_data: One member with photo; one without.
steps: Open list.
Per row: verify avatar control exists left of name (or per design).
Photo member: bitmap loads or cached image visible.
No-photo member: initials/monogram/gray placeholder per design—not blank broken icon unless spec says so.
test_cases.expected_result: All rows render avatar slot per design; no broken layout.

test_cases.title: Display name one line; ellipsis when overlong
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. `m_long` display name ≥40 chars or wider than row width on smallest supported device.
test_cases.test_data: Name: use fixed long string from harness.
steps: Open list on smallest width device (or use split screen).
Measure name label: must not wrap to second line inside name area.
Tail shows ellipsis or fade per platform.
Long-press/tooltip if product provides full name elsewhere—note result.
test_cases.expected_result: Single-line name; overflow visually truncated; no second line in name field.

test_cases.title: Safety badge matches design matrix row-for-row
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. For each design state S1..Sn from product table, map harness member to that state.
test_cases.test_data: Table reference: attach sheet name / Figma node in run notes.
steps: For state S1: set `m_badge` to S1; refresh list.
Compare icon shape, color, label (if any) to matrix row S1.
Repeat for each state; photograph each.
test_cases.expected_result: Each state's badge pixel/logic matches matrix; no state shows wrong icon.

test_cases.title: Speed UI absent when movement class is walking or stationary (not vehicle)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. `m_walk`: GPS speed 4 km/h sustained > hysteresis. `m_stat`: speed 0, good fix.
steps: Open list.
Inspect `m_walk` row: no numeric speed / km/h chip.
Inspect `m_stat` row: same.
test_cases.expected_result: No speed element on non-vehicle rows.

test_cases.title: Speed UI visible only for In a vehicle (after hysteresis)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. `m_car`: GPS speed >6 km/h for >`walk_vehicle_hysteresis_s` (default 6 s).
steps: Satisfy hysteresis; open list.
On `m_car` row locate speed readout.
Verify unit (km/h or mph) matches locale/spec.
Compare value to fixture ± acceptable rounding.
test_cases.expected_result: Speed shown only here; matches spec formatting.

test_cases.title: Below RC threshold: exact copy “Low battery”
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. RC `low_battery_threshold_pct` = 10. `m_low`: reported battery 9%.
steps: Set `m_low` battery to 9% via harness/mock.
Open list.
Read row-level indicator text character-by-character.
test_cases.expected_result: String equals product spec: includes the words Low battery exactly (casing per spec).

test_cases.title: At or above threshold: no “Low battery” row indicator
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. RC threshold 10%. `m_b`: battery 10% then 11% in two sub-checks.
test_cases.test_data: Boundary inclusive/exclusive per product: document if 10% shows or not.
steps: Set 10%; open list; search row for Low battery string.
Set 11%; repeat.
test_cases.expected_result: No Low battery label at 10% and 11% if product defines strictly below 10%; otherwise document deviation with PM sign-off.

test_cases.title: Changing RC threshold moves boundary correctly
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Staging toggles `low_battery_threshold_pct` 10 → 20 → 10.
steps: Threshold 10%, battery 15%: indicator OFF.
Change threshold to 20% (fetch RC); wait refresh: indicator ON.
Revert threshold 10%; wait: indicator OFF.
test_cases.expected_result: Visibility tracks RC threshold with refreshed config.

test_cases.title: Health block hidden while member In a vehicle
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_v`: vehicle true; today fixtures present for steps + HR.
test_cases.test_data: Vehicle + health data both exist in backend.
steps: Open list.
Confirm `m_v` shows speed/vehicle cues per other cases.
Assert no Steps / Sleep / HR / BP / BS chips or summary lines.
test_cases.expected_result: Health completely suppressed for vehicle state despite data.

test_cases.title: Health “today” boundary uses viewer timezone (not member UTC day)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Viewer TZ = America/Los_Angeles. `m_h` not vehicle. Fixture: sample timestamp 23:30 UTC that falls on “yesterday” in viewer TZ but “today” in UTC — document exact instants.
test_cases.test_data: Written in run log: viewer local midnight boundaries.
steps: Set viewer TZ; sync device clock if needed.
Inject sample at documented instant.
Open list; note whether metric appears (today in viewer TZ).
Move sample to true viewer-yesterday; refresh; metric should disappear.
test_cases.expected_result: Inclusion/exclusion follows viewer-local calendar day.

test_cases.title: Cap: at most two distinct indicator types; each shows latest sample
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_h` not vehicle; today has fresh Steps, Sleep, HR, BP, BS with distinct timestamps.
steps: Open list.
List visible health types (count ≤2).
For each visible type, compare value to latest today sample in fixture.
Confirm third type absent.
test_cases.expected_result: Only two types rendered; values match latest per type for viewer-today.

test_cases.title: Signed-off interpretation: 2 types vs “3 readings” wording
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Product owner document attached: which interpretation shipped.
steps: With fixture giving 2 types × multiple readings, verify UI matches signed doc (e.g. two types only, or two types with two values from one).
Attach screenshot + PM initials.
test_cases.expected_result: Matches signed interpretation only; otherwise fail until spec updated.

test_cases.title: Equal timestamp tie-break: BP > BS > Sleep > HR > Steps
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_h` not vehicle; inject identical logged-at for subset of metrics.
test_cases.test_data: All five types share same timestamp (worst case).
steps: Open list.
Record which two types appear.
Expect first priority BP if in top two slots; if BP excluded by rule, document.
Iterate: only BS+Sleep tie → show BS & Sleep; etc.
test_cases.expected_result: Visible pair always follows strict priority when timestamps equal.

test_cases.title: String formats per indicator type
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Single-type rows: Steps 1843; Sleep 5h34m; HR 87; BP 123/85; BS 6.6 mmol/L.
test_cases.test_data: One member per type across runs OK.
steps: For Steps expect thousands separator if spec says 1,843.
Sleep: 5hr34m or approved UI pattern.
HR: includes BPM.
BP: systolic/diastolic + unit per ticket (mmHG typo vs mmHg — record actual shipped string).
BS: mmol/L and decimal pattern.
test_cases.expected_result: Each format matches written spec or documented shipped copy.

test_cases.title: No health data today: empty state — no dummy numbers
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_empty` not vehicle; zero health samples today.
steps: Open list.
Scan row for 0, --, N/A only if allowed; no random integers.
test_cases.expected_result: Either hide health region or show approved empty state; never fake vitals.

test_cases.title: Activity text max two lines; third line not visible
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_busy` online; harness forces long composition (place + movement + phone + weather strings).
steps: Open list.
Use overlay or screenshot with grid: count text lines in activity label (max 2 full lines).
Confirm tail ellipsis or fade on line 2.
test_cases.expected_result: ≤2 lines; overflow clipped per design.

test_cases.title: Stayed vs not-stayed at other place uses RC minutes (default 20)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. RC `place_stay_minutes` = 20. `m_place` at coordinates X with dwell logged.
test_cases.test_data: Phase A dwell 21 min; Phase B dwell 10 min.
steps: Phase A: open list; record stayed-before wording.
Phase B: shorten dwell <20 min; refresh; record never-stayed / short-visit wording.
test_cases.expected_result: Classification matches dwell vs RC minutes.

test_cases.title: Walking ↔ vehicle switch requires hysteresis duration (default 6 s)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. RC `walk_vehicle_hysteresis_s` = 6. Simulate speed crossing 6 km/h boundary.
test_cases.test_data: Sequence: 4→8→4 km/h with short vs long holds.
steps: Hold 8 km/h for 2 s then 4 km/h: UI should stay walking (no vehicle).
Hold 8 km/h for 7 s: UI becomes vehicle.
Drop to 4 km/h for 2 s: still vehicle.
Hold 4 km/h for 7 s: returns walking.
test_cases.expected_result: State flips only after continuous time in new class ≥ hysteresis.

test_cases.title: Precise location OFF: wording reflects imprecise location when fix exists
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_p` online; GPS fix exists; OS precise location disabled.
steps: Open list.
Find clause indicating reduced accuracy / approximate location per copy deck.
test_cases.expected_result: Imprecise mode visible in composition when rules say so.

test_cases.title: Activity low-battery mention consistent with row “Low battery” rule
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_lb` online; battery 8%; threshold 10%.
steps: Open list.
Row shows Low battery indicator (TC-030).
Read activity: if spec composes low-battery yes/no, it must align (both present or both absent per rules).
test_cases.expected_result: No contradiction between row badge and activity composition.

test_cases.title: Offline last seen: <1 min → just now
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_off` offline; server last_seen = now − 30s.
steps: Open list.
Full string reads: No connection, last seen just now (exact punctuation per copy deck).
No other activity clauses.
test_cases.expected_result: Exact offline template for sub-minute bucket.

test_cases.title: Offline: 1–59 minutes → Xm ago
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_off` offline; last_seen = now − 5 min.
steps: Open list.
Expect: No connection, last seen 5m ago.
Try 59m boundary in separate sub-run if needed.
test_cases.expected_result: Minute bucket uses integer minutes; grammar per spec.

test_cases.title: Offline: <24 h → Yh ago (hours mod 24 per ticket)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_off` offline; last_seen = now − 3 h.
steps: Open list.
String contains hour bucket 3h ago (verify formula y = hours % 24 with PM for edge 25h).
test_cases.expected_result: Hour branch correct.

test_cases.title: Offline: <30 days → Zd ago
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_off` offline; last_seen = now − 5 days.
steps: Open list.

test_cases.expected_result: Day branch correct.

test_cases.title: Offline: beyond long threshold → long time ago
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_off` offline; last_seen = now − 35 days.
steps: Open list.

test_cases.expected_result: Long-time branch; no Xm/Yh/Zd.

test_cases.title: Online member never uses offline last-seen template
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_on` online with full activity inputs.

test_cases.title: Offline row: only last-seen string — no speed/health/place fragments

test_cases.title: Walking band 1–6 km/h: no vehicle speed row element

test_cases.title: Sub-hysteresis vehicle spike does not enter vehicle state
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_w` walking baseline; spike to 8 km/h for 3 s only (hysteresis 6).

test_cases.title: Motion: phone stationary true vs false

test_cases.title: Movement: no GPS branch vs zero-speed with fix
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Two phases on same or two members.

steps: Phase A: open list — capture no-location wording.
Phase B: open list — capture stationary/no-move wording distinct from walking.
test_cases.expected_result: Two different templates; neither is offline string.

test_cases.title: You row last when You is Not safe
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Configure harness so viewer `harness_viewer` maps to a Not safe member row (badge/state Not safe). Include at least one other Safe member `m_s_x`.
test_cases.test_data: You = Not safe. Other members all Safe.
steps: Open Family members list.
Confirm viewer row shows You (or equivalent self label per product).
Confirm that row’s safety state is Not safe.
Confirm every other member row appears above the You row.
Confirm You row is the bottom row.
test_cases.expected_result: You remains the last row even when You is Not safe; ordering above You still follows Not safe / Safe rules for other members.

test_cases.title: You row last when You is Safe
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Viewer `harness_viewer` is Safe. Include at least one Not safe member `m_ns_x` and one other Safe `m_s_x`.
test_cases.test_data: You = Safe. Others: mix Not safe + Safe.
steps: Open Family members list.
Confirm You row is Safe.
Confirm all Not safe members appear above all Safe members (including You).
Confirm You is still the bottom row (below other Safe members if any).
test_cases.expected_result: You last; Safe peers sort A→Z above You; Not safe block remains above entire Safe block.

test_cases.title: Only You on list — still shown as bottom / single row
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha` with only viewer `harness_viewer` (no other family members in harness).
steps: Open Family members list.
Count rows: expect exactly one.
Confirm it is the You row.
Confirm no crash, empty state follows product spec if different from single row.
test_cases.expected_result: Exactly one row for You; treated as sole row (visually bottom of list).

test_cases.title: Online + no GPS fix: activity shows no-location branch
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_ng` online; location fix missing ≥ timeout.
steps: Open list.
Read activity for `m_ng`.
Confirm template matches product “no location” / no GPS wording.
Confirm offline template NOT used (member still online).
test_cases.expected_result: No-location online branch only; not the offline last-seen string.

test_cases.title: Online + in call: baseline, start call, end call (single-signal isolation)
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_call` online; isolate: GPS ok, no severe weather, not late-night window, not low battery (minimal composition).
test_cases.test_data: Idle → active call → idle; telephony = off-hook when in call.
steps: Baseline: phone idle (no call); open Family members list; record full activity line for `m_call`.
Start active call on `m_call`; wait ≥1 foreground refresh interval; record activity again.
Diff: confirm in-call fragment appeared per copy deck (exact substring).
End call; wait ≥1 refresh; confirm in-call fragment removed and baseline-style activity returns (other signals unchanged).
test_cases.expected_result: Call toggles cleanly: fragment only while off-hook; no offline template; no unrelated clauses changing except call state.

test_cases.title: Online + phone use (unlocked / touch): fragment present
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_use` online; screen on + touch events or unlocked flag in harness.
steps: Simulate active phone use.
Open list; capture activity.
Lock screen / stop touch; after refresh, verify fragment updates.
test_cases.expected_result: Phone-use signal appears and disappears with harness.

test_cases.title: Online + severe weather at member location
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_wx` online; weather API stub returns heavy rain / snow / storm per test matrix row.
steps: Set weather stub to heavy precipitation.
Open list.
Match activity clause to approved weather strings.
test_cases.expected_result: Weather facet shows per design for severe conditions.

test_cases.title: Late night local window (21:00–05:00) adds time facet
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_ln` online; device local time 22:00 (or 03:00) with stable location.
steps: Set device time inside 21–05 window.
Open list.
Confirm late-night fragment in activity.
Move time to 12:00; refresh; fragment should not apply (unless overlapping rules).
test_cases.expected_result: Late-night clause only inside documented window.

test_cases.title: RC: list refresh interval only — measure UI tick
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Family `harness_family_alpha`. Isolate: change only `family_list_refresh_interval_s`.
steps: Set 20 s; measure refresh tick (TC-011 method).
Set 5 s; measure again.
test_cases.expected_result: Only interval changes; behavior tracks.

test_cases.title: RC: low_battery_threshold_pct only
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Fix battery at 12%. Threshold 15% vs 10%.
steps: Threshold 10%: indicator off.
Threshold 15%: indicator on.
test_cases.expected_result: Threshold RC drives visibility independent of other keys.

test_cases.title: RC: place_stay_minutes only
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. `m_place` dwell 25 min. Stay minutes 30 vs 20.
steps: At 30 min threshold: not stayed yet at 25 min dwell — document branch.
At 20 min threshold: stayed at 25 min — document branch.
test_cases.expected_result: Stay classification follows RC minutes.

test_cases.title: RC: walk_vehicle_hysteresis_s only
test_cases.preconditions: Harness (no login): `family_harness_id` + per-row `member_harness_id` (install profile, staging deep link, or env flag). Document the exact harness slot per row in test evidence. Speed square wave across 6 km/h; hysteresis 6 vs 2 s.
steps: At 6 s: use TC-052 timing expectations.
At 2 s: flips faster; document shorter hold requirement.
test_cases.expected_result: Hysteresis RC changes flip delay.
